metadata.description: Marketplace for Canvas LMS tooling for Claude — this repository hosts the canvas-course-manager plugin and serves as its own marketplace.

plugins.name: canvas-course-manager
plugins.description: Manage Canvas LMS coursework from Claude: create assignments, quizzes, modules, and pages as reviewed drafts, grade submissions against rubrics, post announcements, and render grade/progress charts inline. Bundles two MCP servers, slash commands, agents, skills, a publish-guard hook, and interactive MCP Apps panels (course explorer, content composer, chart views) for Claude Desktop.
